text.title: Prototyping Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Prototyping.

example.scenario: 1.5hr Figma click-through prototype testing IF a progress bar reduces onboarding step-3 dropoff. 5-user remote test + funnel snapshot. Outcome: kept (dropoff 24% from 35%). Log row 042 created. Next iteration tests step-4.
